headline: $188K in Delivery Fees Forced This Restaurant Owner to Ditch DoorDash and Uber Eats: ‘That’s Losses on Us’
summary: DoorDash and Uber Eats generate billions in revenue, powered by the 15% to 30% cut they take on each order placed through their platforms.

raw.headline: $188K in Delivery Fees Forced This Restaurant Owner to Ditch DoorDash and Uber Eats: ‘That’s Losses on Us’
raw.summary: DoorDash and Uber Eats generate billions in revenue, powered by the 15% to 30% cut they take on each order placed through their platforms.

headline: At 31, She Feels Behind Financially And All She Ever Thinks About Is Money. Could One Simple Change Put Her In A Better Financial Situation?
summary: A 31-year-old woman says she can’t stop thinking about money, even though she’s in the most stable position she’s ever been in. She has no debt, keeps her monthly expenses around $900 and manages to save a little while working...

headline: Domino's Pulls 2027 Innovations Forward To Compete More Aggressively
summary: Domino's Pizza reported downbeat Q1 results. Analysts lowered their price targets due to stiff competition and tough macro.

raw.headline: Domino's Pulls 2027 Innovations Forward To Compete More Aggressively
raw.summary: Domino's Pizza reported downbeat Q1 results. Analysts lowered their price targets due to stiff competition and tough macro.

headline: Hims & Hers Nominates Kofi Amoo-Gottfried to its Board of Directors
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, April 28, 2026--Hims & Hers Health, Inc. ("Hims & Hers", NYSE: HIMS), the leading health and wellness platform, has nominated Kofi Amoo-Gottfried for election as a new director at the company’s 2026 annual shareholder meeting in June.

raw.headline: Hims & Hers Nominates Kofi Amoo-Gottfried to its Board of Directors

headline: DoorDash expands grocery offering in Canada with Empire partnership
summary: The expansion covers all ten provinces and adds 12 grocery brands from Empire’s portfolio to the delivery platform.

raw.headline: DoorDash expands grocery offering in Canada with Empire partnership
raw.summary: The expansion covers all ten provinces and adds 12 grocery brands from Empire’s portfolio to the delivery platform.
